{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Operations Manager",
  "description": "Transport Services Limited (TSL) is a leading provider of end-to-end logistics solutions in Nigeria, with expertise in road transportation, supply chain management, and fleet operations. We are committed to developing talent that will drive innovation and excellence in the logistics sector.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We&rsquo;re looking for an experienced Operations Manager to plan, coordinate, and oversee TSL Metroline passenger transport operations; drive service efficiency; and manage the bus fleet and budgets.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and manage staff, addressing HR issues in line with company policies
	Ensure compliance with health, safety, and security regulations
	Conduct risk assessments and review processes affecting on-road operations
	Oversee bus operations, maintenance, and servicing
	Collaborate with other departments on operations processes
	Prepare and manage budgets, providing updates throughout the year


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a University Degree with a minimum 8 years in a bus transport company, with 3+ years in a management role
	Recognized certificate of professional competence in a relevant discipline
	Membership of a recognized professional body.


Method&nbsp; of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV to:&nbsp;dinmarecruits@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Operations Manager Job at Transport Services Limited




        
    

        
        Transport Services Limited (TSL) is a leading provider of end-to-end logistics solutions in Nigeria, with expertise in road transportation, supply chain management, and fleet operations. We are committed to developing talent that will drive innovation and excellence in the logistics sector.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We’re looking for an experienced Operations Manager to plan, coordinate, and oversee TSL Metroline passenger transport operations; drive service efficiency; and manage the bus fleet and budgets.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and manage staff, addressing HR issues in line with company policies
	Ensure compliance with health, safety, and security regulations
	Conduct risk assessments and review processes affecting on-road operations
	Oversee bus operations, maintenance, and servicing
	Collaborate with other departments on operations processes
	Prepare and manage budgets, providing updates throughout the year


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a University Degree with a minimum 8 years in a bus transport company, with 3+ years in a management role
	Recognized certificate of professional competence in a relevant discipline
	Membership of a recognized professional body.


Method  of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV to: dinmarecruits@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk / HMO Billing Officer",
  "description": "Solid Rock Hospital (Medical and Dental clinic) is a privately owned and an ultra-modern Hospital with 26 beds located at No. 6 Akinsanya Street Ojodu Lagos. The Hospital was founded on June 21, 1992. It is fully registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission with Registration number: RC. 219842.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk / HMO Billing Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ojodu Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Receive inbound calls from customers; providing information regarding services
	Responds promptly to general inquiries from staff and clients via e-mail and phone calls
	Assist customers by answering questions and solving problems.
	Greets clients on arrival to the Hospital
	Register New Patients on the medical record system software
	Filling and retrieval of patient records.
	Invoicing and receipt of payments
	Liaise with HMO/ NHIS on behalf of patient and take necessary approvals
	Control the traffic flow of patients at the reception area.
	Any other assigned task.


Qualifications


	B.Sc in any Social Science or Science course
	Should have a minimum of 2 years of Post NYSC.


Knowledge, Skills And Abilities:


	Caring and compassionate nature
	Excellent teamwork and people skills
	Ability to use initiative
	Ability to deal with emotionally charged and pressured situations
	Verbal and written communication skills
	Resilience
	Excellent knowledge of HMO/NHIS scheme
	Good computer skills
	Outstanding organizational and multi-tasking skills
	Must reside within Ojodu,Ogba, Isheri or any other area closer to the location of the Hospital.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;takpa.t@solidrockhospital.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Front Desk / HMO Billing Officer Job at Solid Rock Hospital




        
    

        
        Solid Rock Hospital (Medical and Dental clinic) is a privately owned and an ultra-modern Hospital with 26 beds located at No. 6 Akinsanya Street Ojodu Lagos. The Hospital was founded on June 21, 1992. It is fully registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission with Registration number: RC. 219842.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk / HMO Billing Officer

Job Location: Ojodu Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Receive inbound calls from customers; providing information regarding services
	Responds promptly to general inquiries from staff and clients via e-mail and phone calls
	Assist customers by answering questions and solving problems.
	Greets clients on arrival to the Hospital
	Register New Patients on the medical record system software
	Filling and retrieval of patient records.
	Invoicing and receipt of payments
	Liaise with HMO/ NHIS on behalf of patient and take necessary approvals
	Control the traffic flow of patients at the reception area.
	Any other assigned task.


Qualifications


	B.Sc in any Social Science or Science course
	Should have a minimum of 2 years of Post NYSC.


Knowledge, Skills And Abilities:


	Caring and compassionate nature
	Excellent teamwork and people skills
	Ability to use initiative
	Ability to deal with emotionally charged and pressured situations
	Verbal and written communication skills
	Resilience
	Excellent knowledge of HMO/NHIS scheme
	Good computer skills
	Outstanding organizational and multi-tasking skills
	Must reside within Ojodu,Ogba, Isheri or any other area closer to the location of the Hospital.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: takpa.t@solidrockhospital.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HSE Manager",
  "description": "Worknigeria was established with a Singular Vision. To help the vast Nigerian workforce find meaningful jobs. We are also on a mission to upskill them in the best ways possible and help them grow with and within their careers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HSE Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Warri, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time
Sector: Oil &amp; Gas &ndash; EPIC Services

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced HSE Manager for an EPIC oil and gas servicing company in Warri.
	The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in Health, Safety, and Environment management, particularly in pipeline projects, and will lead the HSE function, managing teams and ensuring compliance with industry standards across all projects.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop, implement, and maintain HSE policies, procedures, and systems aligned with company and industry standards.
	Lead HSE planning and risk assessments for EPIC projects, with a focus on pipeline construction and maintenance.
	Oversee a team of HSE leads and officers, providing guidance, mentoring, and performance management.
	Ensure compliance with statutory regulations, corporate HSE standards, and client requirements.
	Conduct safety audits, inspections, and incident investigations, ensuring corrective actions are implemented effectively.
	Provide HSE training, mentoring, and awareness programs for project teams and contractors.
	Collaborate with project management, engineering, and operations teams to integrate HSE considerations into all project phases.
	Monitor and report HSE performance metrics to senior management, driving continuous improvement initiatives.
	Foster a culture of safety, environmental stewardship, and regulatory compliance across all levels of the organization.


Job Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in HSE, Engineering, or related discipline; a Master&rsquo;s degree is an advantage.
	10&ndash;15 years of HSE experience in the oil and gas industry, with hands-on experience managing pipeline projects.
	Proven experience leading HSE teams, supervising HSE leads/officers, and managing multiple project sites.
	Strong knowledge of industry HSE standards, regulatory frameworks, and best practices.
	Demonstrated expertise in risk management, safety audits, incident investigation, and HSE reporting.
	Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
	Ability to work onsite and manage HSE activities across large-scale projects.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@worknigeria.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

HSE Manager Job at Worknigeria




        
    

        
        Worknigeria was established with a Singular Vision. To help the vast Nigerian workforce find meaningful jobs. We are also on a mission to upskill them in the best ways possible and help them grow with and within their careers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HSE Manager

Job Location: Warri, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time
Sector: Oil & Gas – EPIC Services

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced HSE Manager for an EPIC oil and gas servicing company in Warri.
	The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in Health, Safety, and Environment management, particularly in pipeline projects, and will lead the HSE function, managing teams and ensuring compliance with industry standards across all projects.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop, implement, and maintain HSE policies, procedures, and systems aligned with company and industry standards.
	Lead HSE planning and risk assessments for EPIC projects, with a focus on pipeline construction and maintenance.
	Oversee a team of HSE leads and officers, providing guidance, mentoring, and performance management.
	Ensure compliance with statutory regulations, corporate HSE standards, and client requirements.
	Conduct safety audits, inspections, and incident investigations, ensuring corrective actions are implemented effectively.
	Provide HSE training, mentoring, and awareness programs for project teams and contractors.
	Collaborate with project management, engineering, and operations teams to integrate HSE considerations into all project phases.
	Monitor and report HSE performance metrics to senior management, driving continuous improvement initiatives.
	Foster a culture of safety, environmental stewardship, and regulatory compliance across all levels of the organization.


Job Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in HSE, Engineering, or related discipline; a Master’s degree is an advantage.
	10–15 years of HSE experience in the oil and gas industry, with hands-on experience managing pipeline projects.
	Proven experience leading HSE teams, supervising HSE leads/officers, and managing multiple project sites.
	Strong knowledge of industry HSE standards, regulatory frameworks, and best practices.
	Demonstrated expertise in risk management, safety audits, incident investigation, and HSE reporting.
	Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
	Ability to work onsite and manage HSE activities across large-scale projects.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@worknigeria.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Experienced Sales Executive",
  "description": "Beem Farm Foods is a fast-growing food processing and protein brand serving thousands of&nbsp;households across Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Experienced Sales Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are on a mission to provide families and businesses with healthy, ready-to-cook and ready-to-eat smoked proteins produced under hygienic, NAFDAC-compliant conditions.
	Our promise of hygiene, safety, and convenience drives everything we do.


Role Overview


	The Sales &amp; Customer Service Representative is responsible for managing customer interactions from inquiry to purchase, ensuring excellent service delivery, and achieving weekly and monthly sales targets.
	This role requires strong communication skills, product knowledge, and the ability to convert inquiries into repeat customers while maintaining Beem Farms&rsquo; reputation for exceptional customer experience.


Key Responsibilities


	Sales &amp; Conversion Engage with customers via WhatsApp, phone, and social media DMs to drive sales.
	Convert inquiries into confirmed orders while maintaining a high conversion rate.
	Cross-sell and upsell Beem products based on customer preferences.
	Meet weekly and monthly sales targets as set by the Head of Sales.
	Customer Relationship Management Maintain a positive and professional attitude in all interactions.
	Manage the customer journey: lead &rarr; sale &rarr; delivery &rarr; feedback &rarr; repeat purchase.
	Follow up with customers after sales to ensure satisfaction and encourage loyalty.
	Handle objections such as pricing and delivery concerns confidently and persuasively.
	Customer Service Excellence Respond promptly and professionally to inquiries, complaints, and feedback.
	Keep accurate records of customer communications and orders.
	Coordinate with the operations and logistics teams to ensure timely and accurate deliveries.
	Provide support during promotional campaigns, sales drives, and events.
	Reporting &amp; Documentation Update daily sales and customer tracking sheets.
	Submit weekly performance and feedback reports.
	Suggest ideas to improve sales processes, service quality, and customer satisfaction.


Requirements Education &amp; Experience


	Minimum of OND / NCE (Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree preferred).
	At least 1&ndash;2 years of experience in sales, customer service, or related roles &mdash; preferably in FMCG, food, or e-commerce sectors.


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Excellent communication (written and verbal) and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Word for reporting and documentation.
	Strong understanding of customer psychology and sales conversion techniques.
	Confident in using WhatsApp Business, Instagram DMs, and digital communication tools.
	Attention to detail and the ability to multitask under pressure.
	Team player with a positive attitude and integrity.
	Performance Metrics Weekly sales target achievement (%).
	Customer conversion and repeat purchase rate.
	Customer satisfaction and response time.
	Accuracy of reports and communication quality.


Compensation


	Salary: N150,000 - N180,000 / month.&nbsp;
	Competitive base salary.Performance bonuses and growth opportunities within the company.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;akintayotimlexy@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.&nbsp;",

Experienced Sales Executive Job at Beem Farm Foods




        
    

        
        Beem Farm Foods is a fast-growing food processing and protein brand serving thousands of households across Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Experienced Sales Executive

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are on a mission to provide families and businesses with healthy, ready-to-cook and ready-to-eat smoked proteins produced under hygienic, NAFDAC-compliant conditions.
	Our promise of hygiene, safety, and convenience drives everything we do.


Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Sales & Customer Service Representative is responsible for managing customer interactions from inquiry to purchase, ensuring excellent service delivery, and achieving weekly and monthly sales targets.
	This role requires strong communication skills, product knowledge, and the ability to convert inquiries into repeat customers while maintaining Beem Farms’ reputation for exceptional customer experience.


Key Responsibilities


	Sales & Conversion Engage with customers via WhatsApp, phone, and social media DMs to drive sales.
	Convert inquiries into confirmed orders while maintaining a high conversion rate.
	Cross-sell and upsell Beem products based on customer preferences.
	Meet weekly and monthly sales targets as set by the Head of Sales.
	Customer Relationship Management Maintain a positive and professional attitude in all interactions.
	Manage the customer journey: lead → sale → delivery → feedback → repeat purchase.
	Follow up with customers after sales to ensure satisfaction and encourage loyalty.
	Handle objections such as pricing and delivery concerns confidently and persuasively.
	Customer Service Excellence Respond promptly and professionally to inquiries, complaints, and feedback.
	Keep accurate records of customer communications and orders.
	Coordinate with the operations and logistics teams to ensure timely and accurate deliveries.
	Provide support during promotional campaigns, sales drives, and events.
	Reporting & Documentation Update daily sales and customer tracking sheets.
	Submit weekly performance and feedback reports.
	Suggest ideas to improve sales processes, service quality, and customer satisfaction.


Requirements Education & Experience


	Minimum of OND / NCE (Bachelor’s Degree preferred).
	At least 1–2 years of experience in sales, customer service, or related roles — preferably in FMCG, food, or e-commerce sectors.


Skills & Competencies:


	Excellent communication (written and verbal) and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Word for reporting and documentation.
	Strong understanding of customer psychology and sales conversion techniques.
	Confident in using WhatsApp Business, Instagram DMs, and digital communication tools.
	Attention to detail and the ability to multitask under pressure.
	Team player with a positive attitude and integrity.
	Performance Metrics Weekly sales target achievement (%).
	Customer conversion and repeat purchase rate.
	Customer satisfaction and response time.
	Accuracy of reports and communication quality.


Compensation


	Salary: N150,000 - N180,000 / month. 
	Competitive base salary.Performance bonuses and growth opportunities within the company.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: akintayotimlexy@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.     

    

        Click here to Apply
